meta.title: Claim Scope & Services - Asistenca
meta.description: Claims-first support for vehicle, property, and injury matters, with explicit guidance-only and referral boundaries.

hero.title: Vehicle, property, and injury claims first
hero.subtitle: Free Start and membership begin with the claim types we can support now. Guidance-only matters stay advisory, and out-of-scope matters are routed to the right next step.

scope.title: The launch scope is explicit before any staff handling starts
scope.subtitle: Use this view to see which matters fit the current launch recovery path, which ones stay guidance-only, and when Interdomestik switches to referral or opt-in legal routes.

launch.title: Handled now
launch.description: These claim types fit the launch recovery path when there is a plausible monetary outcome.
items: Personal injury claims with a monetary recovery path
launch.note: Free Start can prepare the pack. Membership adds human triage and document review before any accepted escalation.

guidance.title: Guidance only
guidance.description: These categories can still receive guidance or document review, but they do not enter success-fee recovery at launch.
items: Landlord disputes without a direct monetary recovery path
Wage withholding or employment disputes without a clear payout path
Repair enforcement or contract termination disputes without a direct payout
Broader consumer complaints outside the launch claim types
guidance.note: We keep these matters advisory and refer onward when a partner route makes more sense.

outOfScope.title: Out of scope
outOfScope.description: These matters are not part of the launch contract and are not accepted for staff handling.
items: General business disputes outside defined group packages
outOfScope.note: We do not imply coverage here. Where possible, we route you to a more suitable external provider.

boundary.title: Referral boundaries
boundary.body: Partner referral and legal routes begin only after scope review. Staff-led escalation is available only for accepted recovery matters; everything else remains self-serve guidance, membership guidance, or a referral.
items: External legal partner action requires a separate written opt-in after case acceptance.
Flight delay compensation stays outside the current launch path and returns in a later phase.

consultation.title: Free Consultations
consultation.subtitle: 6 no-cost services to help you understand your rights

services.title: Legal Basis for Compensation
services.description: Free consultation to determine the legal basis for compensation of all types of damages.

services.title: Compensation Procedures
services.description: Consultation on the required procedures to obtain compensation from insurance companies.

services.title: Injury Categorization
services.description: Categorization of injuries sustained in any type of accident by a specialized medical censor.

services.title: Material Damage Calculation
services.description: Alternative calculation for material damages compared to those made by insurance companies.

services.title: Disability Coefficient
services.description: Determination of the limited ability coefficient in case of accident - disability coefficient.

services.title: On-Scene Assistance
services.description: How to act at the accident scene? Free consultations from 08:00-20:00.

expertise.title: Expertise & Assessment
expertise.subtitle: Specialized team of experts to achieve maximum compensation

services.title: Pre-Court Expertise
services.description: We advance all costs for preparing expert reports for damages in pre-court processes.

services.title: Compensation Mediation
services.description: Complete service in the damage compensation procedure with exclusive member discounts.

legal.title: Legal Representation
legal.subtitle: We organize the judicial route to achieve maximum compensation

services.title: Court Expertise
services.description: We advance costs for legal representation, lawyer fees, and court expertise.

services.title: Full Court Organization
services.description: We organize damage payment through court procedure in case of incorrect compensation offer.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Start with the claim types we support now, or contact us for guidance and routing when your matter falls outside the launch scope.
